nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鹮科
nodes.summary: 鹮科（Threskiornithidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联30种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等30种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 黑鹮
nodes.summary: 黑鹮（Red-naped ibis，学名 Pseudibis papillosa），分类上属于鹈形目，并归入鹮科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于阿拉瓦利嶺、湖泊、草沼，常见栖息地包括湿地，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 鹈形目
nodes.summary: 鹈形目（Pelecaniformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联93种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等93种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿拉瓦利嶺
nodes.summary: 阿拉瓦利嶺是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Painted spurfowl、灰原雞、黑鹮，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 草沼
nodes.summary: 草沼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括黑颈天鹅、赤麻鸭、赤嘴潜鸭等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湖泊
nodes.summary: 湖泊是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、瘤鸭、美洲瘤鸭等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red-naped ibis is widely distributed in the plains of the Indian subcontinent. In Rajasthan, it is common along the Aravalli mountains but entirely avoids using the trees on the mountains. The red-naped ibis uses lakes, marshes, riverbeds, irrigated farmlands, dry fallow fields, villages, towns and cities. More wetlands on the landscape attract a greater number of red-naped ibises, but birds forage largely in dry fields increasing use of wetlands for foraging during summer. In semi-arid areas, it is commonly seen in small flocks of 2–4, which could be family groups, with larger groups being relatively rare.{{Cite journal |last1=Ameta |first1=Hitesh |last2=Koli |first2=Vijay Kumar |last3=Kittur |first3=Swati |last4=Sundar |first4=K

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Unlike other ibises in the region it is not found very often in waterbodies and is often found in dry fields, but are attracted more to areas that have more wetlands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: thumb|A pair of Red Naped Ibises at Mehtab Bagh, [[Agra]] The species has declined greatly in Pakistan due to hunting and habitat loss
